testcase.name: test_get_roles_returns_predefined_roles

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing expected role: office_manager assert 'office_manager' in ['technician', 'lead_tech', 'dispatcher', 'manager', 'admin', 'accountant', ...]

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_rfc002_phase1_2.py:103: in test_get_roles_returns_predefined_roles assert expected in role_names, f"Missing expected role: {expected}" E AssertionError: Missing expected role: office_manager E assert 'office_manager' in ['technician', 'lead_tech', 'dispatcher', 'manager', 'admin', 'accountant', ...]

testcase.name: test_pcb_status_workflow
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_rfc002_phase1_2.py:348: in test_pcb_status_workflow assert create_response.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_convert_pcb_to_job
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_rfc002_phase1_2.py:383: in test_convert_pcb_to_job assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 500: {"detail":"Internal server error","status_code":500} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_add_proposal_option
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_rfc002_phase1_2.py:491: in test_add_proposal_option assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 500: {"detail":"Internal server error","status_code":500} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
